name: volante
description: Patrol and direct multiple concurrent Claude Code sessions (in other terminal windows/panes) as a development lead. One command (/volante) runs one PDCA patrol cycle: observe sessions via a pluggable terminal adapter (kitty/tmux/...), decide per a fixed decision tree (never blanket delegation — every instruction states what and how far), log every decision to a journal, and periodically retro the decision log to improve the tree (tree changes require human approval). Loop runs (/loop + /volante) auto-stop after 2 consecutive no-op patrol cycles. A companion command (/volante-epic add|remove|edit|list) manages the underlying epic Specs (journal/specs/*.json + journal/goals.md) conversationally.
